nasb.text: Because of all my adversaries, I have become a reproach, Especially to my neighbors, And an object of dread to my acquaintances; Those who see me in the street flee from me.

esv.text: Because of all my adversaries I have become a reproach, especially to my neighbors, and an object of dread to my acquaintances; those who see me in the street flee from me.

cnv.text: 我因眾仇敵的緣故，成了眾人羞辱的對象， 在我的鄰居面前更是這樣； 認識我的人都懼怕我； 在街上看見我的，都避開我。

ccb.text: 仇敌羞辱我， 邻居厌弃我， 朋友害怕我， 路人纷纷躲避我。

csbs.text: 我因一切的敌人，成了辱骂的对象， 尤其是在我的邻居面前； 认识我的都惧怕我， 街道上看见我的都逃离我。
